qa_pairs.question: What are the required commands to set up, build, and download input data for a CESM test case after navigating to its directory?
qa_pairs.answer: After navigating to the `test_case` directory, you need to run `./case.setup`, then `./case.build`, and finally `./check_input_data --download` to set up, build, and download input data, respectively.

qa_pairs.question: How do you set up a new CESM test case from within its directory?
qa_pairs.answer: You can set up a new CESM test case by executing the command `./case.setup` in its directory.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to compile or build a CESM test case?
qa_pairs.answer: The command `./case.build` is used to build a CESM test case.

qa_pairs.question: Which command allows you to download necessary input files for a CESM simulation?
qa_pairs.answer: To download input files for a CESM simulation, you should use the command `./check_input_data --download`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to preview and submit a CESM run?
qa_pairs.answer: To preview a CESM run, execute `./preview_run`. After reviewing, you can submit the case using `./case.submit`.

qa_pairs.question: How do you preview the details of a CESM run before submitting it?
qa_pairs.answer: You can preview the details of a CESM run by executing the command `./preview_run`.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to submit a CESM simulation to the batch system?
qa_pairs.answer: The command `./case.submit` is used to submit a CESM simulation.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the official website for the Community Earth System Model (CESM)?
qa_pairs.answer: The main website for the Community Earth System Model (CESM) is [https://www.cesm.ucar.edu/].

qa_pairs.question: Is there a quickstart guide available for CESM2.1, and if so, where?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, a CESM Quickstart Guide for CESM2.1 is available at [https://escomp.github.io/CESM/versions/cesm2.1/html/].

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation regarding CESM Coupled Model XML Files?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation for CESM Coupled Model XML Files can be found at [https://esmci.github.io/cime/versions/maint-5.6/html/xml_files/cesm.html].
